title: Deployment Strategist
must_haves: Ambitious early-career generalist eager for ownership (post-sales, scale large enterprise accounts)
Manage complex customer relationships in high-stakes environments
Translate operational challenges into AI solutions; close/expand 6-8 figure contracts
hard_blockers: Enterprise account expansion / 6-8 figure contract ownership — Ryan has community-led GTM, not enterprise account management/post-sales delivery
Domain = field inspection for heavy industry (Oil&Gas, Pharma, Chem; AstraZeneca, SpaceX) — far from crypto/Web3/consumer-AI
Elite team/pedigree signal (Imperial/CMU/Oxford, Goldman, Index Ventures, EF)
met_strengths: 'Early-career generalist with ownership' framing fits founder-associate/first-employee profile well
Agentic-AI building fluency for the 'translate problems into AI solutions' mandate
one_line_verdict: The 'early-career high-ownership generalist' framing genuinely fits Ryan, but it's an enterprise post-sales/account-expansion role in heavy-industry inspection — domain and enterprise-delivery distance keep it a stretch.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby API (getscope). Scope = AI-native field-data-collection for inspectors; $20m Index Ventures round, ex-EF 2024. London. Also has a separate 'Deployment Lead' and 'Forward Deployed Engineer'.
